query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_topics FROM topics WHERE isActive = 1;
SELECT category, COUNT(*) as count FROM topics WHERE isActive = 1 GROUP BY category ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 15;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2T8Yuzty3NAouPd.b9d024491cfd --database e62Q4utoyfc8BuJjv96dsP --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total_topics FROM topics WHERE isActive = 1;
SELECT category, COUNT(*) as count FROM topics WHERE isActive = 1 GROUP BY category ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 15;
